using compressed domain processing techniques other than decoding, e.g. modification of transform coefficients, variable length coding [VLC] data or run-length data (motion estimation in a transform domain H04N19/547; processing of decoded motion vectors H04N19/513)
using predictive coding (H04N19/61 takes precedence)
using transform coding
using error resilience
characterised by syntax aspects related to video coding, e.g. related to compression standards

using pre-processing or post-processing specially adapted for video compression
using coding techniques not provided for in groups H04N19/10-H04N19/85, e.g. fractals
